summary: Complete frontend testing of WebGL visual engine with cinematic postprocessing. All functionality working perfectly - dashboard loads with visual engine, login/onboarding flow works, all UI components present and interactive.
passed_tests: Canvas element present inside visual engine
Dashboard loads at /dashboard with all content intact
Login page functional with all form elements (email, password, sign in, google)
Complete onboarding flow works (6 steps: welcome → business → trade → team → theme → finish)
Full user flow: login → onboarding → dashboard navigation successful
All UI layer components present: dashboard-grid, left-column, ai-core-placeholder, right-column
Content counts correct: 3 attention items, 3 projects, 4 trades, 4 schedule items, 4 urgent tasks, 4 overview stats
All interactive elements clickable (AI core button, action buttons)
No JavaScript errors blocking the page (WebGL warnings normal as expected)
WebGL postprocessing effects (Bloom, Vignette, Noise) working - visible atmospheric lighting and cinematic feel
Visual engine loads dynamically with SSR disabled as designed
